title: Squirrel Removal in Cypress Hills, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Cypress Hills, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, damage repair & prevention. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Cypress Hills residents face unique squirrel challenges, with these persistent rodents infiltrating attics, crawl spaces, and soffits throughout the neighborhood's mix of Victorian homes and multi-family buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services tailored to Cypress Hills properties, from historic homes near Highland Park to newer construction along Fulton Street. Our humane removal methods effectively eliminate squirrel infestations while preventing future re-entry.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Cypress Hills homeowners for years with specialized knowledge of Brooklyn's squirrel behavior patterns and building vulnerabilities. Our licensed technicians use proven humane trapping methods, complete attic restoration, and guaranteed exclusion work to protect your Cypress Hills property long-term.
localContext: Cypress Hills' proximity to Highland Park and the Ridgewood Reservoir creates an ideal habitat for gray squirrels that frequently migrate into residential attics and commercial buildings along Jamaica Avenue. The neighborhood's older housing stock, including Queen Anne-style homes and pre-war apartment buildings, often features vulnerable entry points that squirrels exploit during nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Cypress Hills?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Cypress Hills typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, sanitization, and damage repair to insulation and wiring.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Cypress Hills?
faqs.answer: Cypress Hills' location adjacent to Highland Park and numerous mature trees along its residential streets provides abundant food sources and nesting opportunities for squirrels. The neighborhood's older homes often have gaps in soffits, roof vents, and fascia boards that squirrels use to access warm attics, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal services humane in Cypress Hills?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, New York State-approved methods for squirrel removal in Cypress Hills. We employ live trapping and relocation techniques, one-way exclusion doors, and never use poisons or lethal methods. Our approach prioritizes animal welfare while effectively solving your squirrel problem.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Cypress Hills home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Cypress Hills are completed within 3-7 days, though timeline depends on the number of squirrels and access points. We begin with same-day or next-day inspection, followed by trap placement and monitoring. Once all squirrels are removed, we seal entry points and complete repairs to prevent re-entry.
